app.name: Plate-Clean
app.footer: Finishing a meal isn't a moral test — it's a small win for the planet.

landing.headline:
Finish your plate.
Unlock a reward.
landing.description: Snap your plate before & after. Eat what you love — when little goes to waste, a free dish or a discount is on us.
landing.tagline_disclaimer: Less food into the bin means less methane out of it. That's the only scoreboard we keep.
landing.how_scan_d: Point at the QR on the table tent.
landing.how_snap_d: Two quick photos of your plate.
landing.ethics_note: Rewards are a thank-you for reducing waste — not a judgement. No reward just means a smaller portion next time. Photos kept 7 days.

onboard_choice.headline: How would you like to continue?
onboard_choice.subheadline: Pick the way that's fastest for you. Your reward and receipt work the same either way.
onboard_choice.phone_blurb: We'll text you a 6-digit code. No password, no account setup.
onboard_choice.email_blurb: Sign in or create a full account. Bills also arrive in your inbox.
onboard_choice.ethics_note: We only send bills, OTPs, and reward alerts. No marketing. Delete your data any time from Profile.

quick_start.title: Use your phone, skip the account
quick_start.blurb: Enter your phone number and we'll text you a one-time code. You'll get the reward both in this app and as an SMS so you don't have to keep this tab open.
quick_start.phone_hint: Include the country code, e.g. +91 for India.
quick_start.age_confirm: I confirm I am 18 or older.
quick_start.code_hint: Check your SMS. The code expires in 5 minutes.
quick_start.have_account: Have an account already? Sign in →

stats.title: Plate-Clean impact
stats.subtitle: Aggregate food kept out of the bin across every restaurant on the platform. No personal data — just the numbers.
stats.hero_unit: kg of food kept out of the bin
stats.methodology_1: We compare consumption against a 60% typical-meal baseline. Anything finished above that counts as saved food.
stats.methodology_2: Carbon factor: 2.5 kg CO₂e per kg of cooked food (lifecycle-inclusive, mixed Indian-meal average). One mature tree absorbs ≈ 0.06 kg CO₂e/day.
stats.empty_title: Not enough data yet to show aggregate numbers
stats.empty_blurb: We only publish numbers once enough restaurants and meals are counted in this window — so a single pilot can't be re-identified. Check back as we grow.

login.age_confirm: I confirm I am 18 or older.
login.switch_to_sign_in: Already have an account? Sign in

scan.title: Start a meal
scan.blurb: In production this screen scans a QR sticker on your table. For the pilot, pick a restaurant and type your table code.

order.title: Place your order
order.blurb: Pick what you ordered. Default portion is small — pick more only if you're sure you'll eat it.
order.banner_default: Small is the default portion. Bump it up only if you know you'll finish.

capture.before_blurb: Hold the camera over your plates. Try to fit everything you ordered in the frame.
capture.after_blurb: Snap your plates the way they are right now. A server will review the picture next.
capture.guide_before: Fit every plate inside the circle.
capture.guide_after: Show the plates as they are right now.
capture.missing_nonce: Missing capture token. Re-open the session from the kitchen flow.

session_status.title: Your meal
session_status.waiting_for_food_heading: Your order is on the way
session_status.waiting_for_food_blurb: Relax — no rush. When the plates arrive at your table, tap below and snap the before photo.
session_status.between_meals_hint: Enjoy your meal. When you're ready to pay, come back here.
session_status.review_heading: Your server is reviewing — usually under a minute.
session_status.review_blurb: A staff member checks the photo against your table before any reward is issued. We'll update this screen the moment they decide.
session_status.grew_forest_sub: Every clean plate ≈ a tree-day of carbon back. Small win, real ledger.
session_status.approved_heading: Approved — thanks for finishing what you ordered.
session_status.approved_blurb: Your score was just below the threshold this time, so no reward today. Try a smaller portion next visit to land it.
session_status.rejected_blurb: The server didn't see enough food finished to qualify. If you think this is wrong, you can raise a dispute — an owner will look at it within 48 hours.
session_status.get_bill_blurb: Emailed or texted to you. Show it at the counter to pay.

get_bill.title: Get my bill
get_bill.blurb: We'll send an itemised tax invoice with the GST split. Pay at the counter with the printed copy or your phone.
get_bill.sms_hint: Include the country code. Standard messaging rates apply.
get_bill.sent_email_blurb: Should land at {{target}} within a minute. Check spam if you don't see it.
get_bill.sent_sms_blurb: Should land at {{target}} within a minute.
get_bill.generic_error: Couldn't send the bill. Try again.

choose_reward.heading: Pick how you'd like your reward.
choose_reward.value_blurb: Value: {{amount}}. Same either way. You have 30 days — full value for the first 15, half value after.

type.menu_item_blurb: Hand the code to your server. The kitchen sends out the dish.
type.bill_discount_blurb: Same value, applied as a discount the next time you eat at this restaurant. Good for 30 days.

rewards.title: Your rewards
rewards.empty: Nothing here yet. Finish your next meal and one will show up.

profile.title: Profile
profile.delete_confirm: Delete your account and all associated data? This cannot be undone.
profile.delete_blurb: Deletion happens within 7 days. Photos from your sessions are removed too.
profile.retention_blurb: How long should we keep the before / after photos from your meals? The default is one week. Opt in to 90 days to help us improve the model with your plates — you can change this any time.
profile.retention_7_caption: Photos are removed after one week.
profile.retention_90_caption: Helps train the model on real plates.
profile.sustainability_empty: Finish your next meal to see your impact start to build up.
profile.sustainability_food_saved: kg of food kept out of the bin
profile.sustainability_blurb: We compare how much you ate to a typical restaurant baseline — anything above is food that didn't get thrown out.
